title: 10 best herbal teas for pertussis
intro_desc: Herbal teas for pertussis are a natural remedy that helps alleviate symptoms of this contagious respiratory illness. They work by boosting the immune system and reducing inflammation. The best herbal teas for pertussis include Echinacea purpurea, Echinacea angustifolia, Zingiber officinale, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Echinacea pallida, Eucalyptus globulus, Thymus serpyllum, Lavandula angustifolia, Pelargonium sidoides, and Astragalus membranaceus. If left untreated, pertussis can lead to severe coughing fits, bronchitis, and pneumonia, causing fatigue, missed work or school, and strained relationships with loved ones.
